claims.claim: The average American's blood cholesterol level has gone down in recent decades due to statin medications and a better understanding of diet.
Foods high in dietary cholesterol, such as eggs and shellfish, are not high sources of saturated fat.
Foods once shunned due to high dietary cholesterol content only come from animal products and should not be the focus of a diet.
The benefit of a diet higher in plant-based foods continues, as these are typically not high sources of dietary cholesterol.
